identity: Human female knight, noble face with a determined expression, long golden-blonde braid falling over one shoulder, bright blue eyes, fair skin, strong athletic build.
outfit: Polished steel plate armor with elegant fluting, a royal-blue tabard emblazoned with a silver stag, steel gauntlets and greaves, a blue surcoat sash at the waist.
weapons: A longsword in the right hand, tip-up beside her. A kite-shield emblazoned with the silver stag sigil on the left arm.
attackStyle: East-facing. Longsword mid-swing forward, shield raised high to guard head. Braid streaming.
spellStyle: East-facing. Longsword raised high overhead, shield held in front, blade glowing with pale-silver holy light.
blockStyle: East-facing. Shield raised fully in front, longsword held low and back ready to counter. Crouched stance.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen to one knee, sword dropped point-down beside her, shield still on left arm but hanging.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), noble idle. Longsword held tip-down in front, shield raised to the side displaying the silver stag.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Golden braid, blue eyes, royal-blue tabard with silver stag clearly visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female knight, noble face with a determined expression, long golden-blonde braid falling over one shoulder, bright blue eyes, fair skin, strong athletic build.

OUTFIT: Polished steel plate armor with elegant fluting, a royal-blue tabard emblazoned with a silver stag, steel gauntlets and greaves, a blue surcoat sash at the waist.

WEAPONS: A longsword in the right hand, tip-up beside her. A kite-shield emblazoned with the silver stag sigil on the left arm.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female knight, noble face with a determined expression, long golden-blonde braid falling over one shoulder, bright blue eyes, fair skin, strong athletic build.

OUTFIT: Polished steel plate armor with elegant fluting, a royal-blue tabard emblazoned with a silver stag, steel gauntlets and greaves, a blue surcoat sash at the waist.

WEAPONS: A longsword in the right hand, tip-up beside her. A kite-shield emblazoned with the silver stag sigil on the left arm.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Golden braid, blue eyes, royal-blue tabard with silver stag clearly visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
